question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asked zero didactic questions. All questions in the conversation came from the Student; the Tutor only delivered explanations and confirmations.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks were posed by the Tutor. Substantive points (tiebreaker semantics, copy vs. mutation trade-off) were stated directly rather than elicited.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there are no questions. The Tutor dumped a complete solution in turn 1 and explained reactively.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and explanations are clear and well-organized with helpful tables. But the dynamic is one-way: Tutor explains, Student affirms, with no genuine pedagogical back-and-forth.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
